prompt:
We reorganized the food-pantry toolkit into a proper package yesterday (it used to be one big file) and now the whole thing won't start on the volunteer desk laptop. First thing the test run says:

  Traceback (most recent call last):
    File "test_pantry.py", line 7, in test_intake_normalization
      from pantry.intake import record_donation
    File "pantry/intake.py", line 4, in <module>
      from pantry.reports import weekly_summary
    File "pantry/reports.py", line 4, in <module>
      from pantry.intake import IntakeRecord
  ImportError: cannot import name 'IntakeRecord' from partially initialized module 'pantry.intake' (most likely due to a circular import)

And it's not just that one — every time someone patches whatever import is complaining, the next run trips over a different module, and the shelf-manifest script (export_shelf.py, the thing we print for the volunteer board) dies with its own import error before printing a single line. None of the actual logic changed in the reorg: quantity parsing, the weekly rollups, bin placement — all of that was working Friday and test_pantry.py pins it. Please untangle the wiring so `python3 test_pantry.py` is green, without rewriting modules wholesale or touching the test file.
notes: Import-graph repair, three planted wiring bugs (chain-reveals in this order, intended per family-5C law): (1) circular import pantry.intake <-> pantry.reports — intake_digest's convenience import of weekly_summary sits at module top; reference fix moves it to function level, the reports->intake direction is load-bearing (isinstance check) and stays; (2) pantry/storage/ has no __init__.py — with namespace packages `import pantry.storage` still succeeds, so the failure is the realistic `ImportError: cannot import name 'BinIndex' from 'pantry.storage'`; fix adds the re-exporting __init__.py; (3) export_shelf.py was moved out of the package during the reorg but kept its old `from ..util import format_qty` relative import, so running it as a script dies with 'attempted relative import with no known parent package'; fix switches to the absolute import (script-vs-module lesson). Tests import the modules and also drive the script via subprocess with a CSV fixture the harness writes in-workspace.
